heading: Technical assistance for Russian Far East
label: 5827 Technical assistance for Russian Far East
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of certain functions of President under this section, see section 3(a) of Ex. Ord. No. 12884, , 58 F.R. 64099, as amended, set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1993section 5812 of this title
amendments: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of certain functions of President under this section, see section 3(a) of Ex. Ord. No. 12884, , 58 F.R. 64099, as amended, set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1993section 5812 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The President is authorized to provide technical assistance, through an American university in a region which received nonstop air service to and from the Russian Far East as of , to facilitate the development of United States business opportunities, free markets, and democratic institutions in the Russian Far East.July 1, 1992

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated $2,000,000 to carry out subsection (a).
